name: manage_prefab
description: Performs prefab operations: instantiate a prefab into the scene (with prefab link), open a prefab asset in Prefab Mode for isolation editing, exit Prefab Mode, apply scene instance overrides back to the prefab asset, or revert a scene instance to match the prefab.

action.description: instantiate: place a prefab in the scene. open_edit_mode: open prefab for isolation editing. close_edit_mode: return to the scene. apply_overrides: push scene instance changes back to the prefab asset. revert_overrides: reset a scene instance to match the prefab.

prefab_path.description: Asset path to the prefab file (e.g. 'Assets/Prefabs/Enemy.prefab'). Required for instantiate and open_edit_mode.

game_object.description: Name of the scene prefab instance. Required for apply_overrides and revert_overrides.

name.description: Optional name override for the instantiated GameObject (instantiate only). Defaults to the prefab name.

parent.description: Optional name of a scene GameObject to use as parent when instantiating.

position_x.description: World X position for instantiate. Default 0.

position_y.description: World Y position for instantiate. Default 0.

position_z.description: World Z position for instantiate. Default 0.
